title: Jagatnagar Kalibari
tagline: Jagatnagar Kalibari — spiritual town of West Bengal

overview.short: Jagatnagar Kalibari (Bengali: জগৎনগর কালীবাড়ি) is a Hindu temple located in Jagatnagar near Singur in Hooghly district, dedicated to goddess Kali.
overview.description: Jagatnagar Kalibari (Bengali: জগৎনগর কালীবাড়ি) is a Hindu temple located in Jagatnagar near Singur in Hooghly district, dedicated to goddess Kali. It is situated 34 km away from Kolkata.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jagatnagar Kalibari?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jagatnagar Kalibari is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jagatnagar Kalibari?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (27 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (25 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jagatnagar Kalibari?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jagatnagar Kalibari at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jagatnagar Kalibari?
faq.a: Stays in Jagatnagar Kalibari start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jagatnagar Kalibari?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jagatnagar, Malipukur, Gangadharpur, Azabnagar, Singur (community development block).
